title: Pera bailloniana
taxonomy: Pera bailloniana is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the spurge family. This family includes over 3000 species of plants, many of which are found in tropical regions. Pera bailloniana is native to the tropical forests of South America, where it grows as a large tree.
